name: Taxation of Souls
description: Adventurers lose 5% max HP when entering a new room.
tradeoffDescription: Adventurers are already weakened on kill — you gain slightly less Soul Essence per death.

name: Bloodbound
description: Your minions deal +50% damage but die permanently instead of respawning overnight.
tradeoffDescription: Every minion lost is gone forever. Your dungeon slowly hollows out if you're not careful.

name: Gold Rush
description: Adventurers drop double gold when they die.
tradeoffDescription: One extra adventurer enters the dungeon each day. More prey, more risk.

name: Undying Horde
description: When a minion dies, 40% chance it rises as a weaker undead — half HP, fights until truly destroyed.
tradeoffDescription: Undead minions cannot evolve and die permanently if killed again. Your strongest minions become shambling echoes.

name: Sealed Paths
description: Fleeing adventurers have a 50% chance to get turned around and rerouted deeper into the dungeon.
tradeoffDescription: Cornered adventurers fight with desperate fury — they deal 25% more damage when below their flee threshold.

name: Pack Synergy
description: Minions deal +15% damage per other allied minion in the same room, up to +60%.
tradeoffDescription: Solo minions gain no bonus. Your dungeon rewards dense packing — spread coverage gets weaker.

name: Blood Money
description: Each adventurer killed permanently adds +1 gold per night. The bodies pile up, the gold flows.
tradeoffDescription: Every 5th kill permanently boosts all future adventurers by +2% HP. The dungeon's legend grows.
